species: The aim was to select antibodies capable of discriminating between tumor cells with a high level of CD38 expression and normal healthy cells with a low level of CD38 expression.
tissue: PBMCs were prestained with Cell Trace Blue (Invitrogen, Cat. No. C34568) and cocultured with unstained CAR‐T cells or mock T cells...
cell_type: Using T‐cell chimeric antigen receptors (CAR‐T) to activate and redirect T cells to tumors expressing the cognate antigen...
disease_state: The high‐affinity antibody 028 was used to generate functional CD38 CAR‐T cells as the positive control.
sample_source: The CCC library was first cocultured with normal human PBMCs, which have a low level of CD38 expression.
anatomic_site_tumor: K562 (bone marrow), A549 (lung), PC3 (prostate), and primary PBMC.
cell_line: the antigen presenting K562‐CD38 cells to stimulate CCC at different spiking ratios...
